rationale: No qualitative change for Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved affecting energy price outlook, war in Ukraine continues as background.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keeps oil supply outlook unclear, indirectly affecting energy prices relevant to Polish households and industry.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal AI policy shift has marginal indirect relevance to Poland's tech sector and EU AI regulation debate, but no direct daily-life impact.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap is a distant EU-adjacent political event with negligible direct impact on Polish residents.
